title: Zee Ethda
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image=[[File:ZeeEthda.jpg]] |name=Zee Ethda |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], [[Genon]] |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=Red |skin=Yellow-purple |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Uh, don't worry, Grappa. I'll get your man for you. I just need--''"
"''Need what? Better equipment? A new ship? A refitted capture droid?-''"
"''Well, now that you mention it, having those things would ''cinch'' the job...|Zee Ethda and Grappa, who then decides to have the former killed|[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]]}} '''Zee Ethda''' was an alien [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] employed by [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He was given the job of capturing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] customs officer [[Tarrant Snil]], but failed. He was then given to a group of [[Zanibar]] for their [[Cannibalism|rituals]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zee Ethda |pl=Zee Ethda }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ethda, Zee}} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Mercenaries]]
